$description: Poesys brand tokens (BRAND_CONSTITUTION.md). W3C design-tokens format. THIS FILE IS THE SOLE HOME OF EVERY COLOUR / TYPE / SPACING VALUE. Every surface (site CSS, Chart.js palettes, bill PDFs, report/deck templates) consumes these tokens; a raw colour value living anywhere else is a brand-compliance defect. Palette + type + spacing values are transcribed verbatim from the ratified exemplar in BRAND_CONSTITUTION.md §7. Any change to a colour value is a director-ratified brand dial (same law as R13 curriculum dials) -- do not edit a $value here without a director ratification.

color.$description: BRAG palette: black, white, greys (tints of black for hairlines/secondary text only), and four status colours -- blue/red/amber/green -- each in a bright and a soft variant. Twelve status values + black/white/greys. Bright = live/current state. Soft = historical, backgrounds, fills, projections; soft NEVER appears as text or a thin line (law 3). Plus semantic surface/ink roles that codify the LIGHT-default / dark-as-accent constitution (BRAND_LIGHT_MODE_DEFAULT.md). Every bright status is contrast-checked against the white ground (WCAG AA): blue 6.28:1, red 4.84:1, green 4.63:1, amber(re-tuned) 4.52:1.

grey-40.$description: Tint of black. Secondary text only.

blue.$description: Status: VERIFIED DONE (earned -- expert-hour-passed / at target, never self-declared). Glyph twin: full stop '.'

bright.$description: Live/current. Dots, thin marks on white.

soft.$description: Fill behind black text only; never text or thin line.

red.$description: Status: BLOCKED / FAILING / needs attention. Glyph twin: bang '!'

bright.$description: Live/current. Dots, thin marks on white.

soft.$description: Fill behind black text only; never text or thin line.

amber.$description: Status: AT RISK / PROVISIONAL / ESTIMATED. Glyph twin: tilde '~'

bright.$description: Live/current. Dots, thin marks on white. Re-tuned for the LIGHT ground (BRAND_LIGHT_MODE_DEFAULT.md, director 2026-07-13): the prior #F5A600 read 2.03:1 on white (fails even 3:1 UI) -- this ochre-amber is the warmest amber clearing WCAG AA (4.52:1 on white).

soft.$description: Fill behind black text only; never text or thin line.

green.$description: Status: ON TRACK / in build. Glyph twin: cursor '_'

bright.$description: Live/current. Dots, thin marks on white. 4.63:1 on white -- clears WCAG AA, unchanged in the light-default re-tune.

soft.$description: Fill behind black text only; never text or thin line.

surface.$description: Semantic surface roles (BRAND_LIGHT_MODE_DEFAULT.md, director 2026-07-13). LIGHT is the DEFAULT ground: black on white for the site, documents, every generated artefact. DARK is a NAMED ACCENT, used sparingly for impact (a hero, one statement panel, a headline break) -- NEVER the base of a page. If dark covers most of a page it has become a theme, which is the anti-goal (a brand-compliance defect).

base.$description: DEFAULT page ground. Paper. Black ink on white.

sunken.$description: Recessed backdrop behind base panels (= grey-05).

accent-dark.$description: ACCENT ONLY. The sparing dark-for-impact ground (= structural black), white ink. Legitimate on a hero / single statement panel / deliberate full-bleed break -- punctuation, not paper.

ink.$description: Semantic text roles that pair with the surface roles.

base.$description: Default text: structural black on the light ground.

on-accent.$description: Text on the dark accent surface (white on black).

house.$description: ONE typeface (law 4). Neo-grotesque sans. Hierarchy is carried by weight/size/space only -- no second face, no monospace. OPEN DIAL (BRAND_CONSTITUTION.md §9): a self-hosted equivalent may be proposed by the agent and is director-ratified only. Left as the system stack pending that ratification -- do not self-select a webfont here.

weight.$description: Only weights the exemplar uses. Hierarchy is weight/size/space, never a second face.

size.$description: Type scale in px, transcribed from the exemplar. Display sizes use clamp() at render time; these are the anchor values.

spacing.$description: Spacing scale in px, transcribed from the exemplar's rhythm.

hairline.$description: The only line weight. Black = structural, grey-15 = secondary.

glyph.$description: The six-glyph grammar (law 5 / BRAND_CONSTITUTION.md §6). Native house-face characters -- no image assets, survive in plain text (NTFY/digest/commit). Each has exactly one meaning, everywhere, forever. Six is the ceiling.

done.$description: full stop -- Done. Verified, final, closed. Colour twin: blue.

in_build.$description: cursor -- In build. Live now, on track. Colour twin: green.

estimated.$description: tilde -- Estimated, provisional, approximate. Colour twin: amber.

blocked.$description: bang -- Blocked, failing, needs attention. Colour twin: red.

action.$description: prompt -- Action, go, next. Links, CTAs, instructions.

working.$description: comment -- The working: basis, provenance, clock labels.
